query_lanes.label: ICE official
query_lanes.query: from:ICEgov -is:retweet

query_lanes.label: DHS official
query_lanes.query: from:DHSgov (ICE OR immigration OR deportation OR removal OR detention OR enforcement OR arrested) -is:retweet

query_lanes.label: CBP official
query_lanes.query: from:CBP (ICE OR immigration OR removal OR deportation OR detention OR arrested OR enforcement) -is:retweet

query_lanes.label: HSI official
query_lanes.query: from:HSI_HQ (arrest OR arrested OR detention OR operation OR investigation OR smuggling OR trafficking) -is:retweet

query_lanes.label: DOJ and U.S. Attorneys
query_lanes.query: (from:TheJusticeDept OR "U.S. Attorney") (ICE OR HSI OR immigration OR deportation OR alien OR smuggling OR removal) -is:retweet

query_lanes.label: Federal enforcement partners
query_lanes.query: (from:USMarshalsHQ OR from:FBI OR from:DEAHQ OR from:ATFHQ) (ICE OR HSI OR immigration OR alien OR deportation OR smuggling) -is:retweet

query_lanes.label: ERO operations
query_lanes.query: (ICE OR ERO OR "Enforcement and Removal Operations") (arrest OR arrested OR detained OR fugitive OR operation) -is:retweet lang:en

query_lanes.label: Removal and deportation
query_lanes.query: (ICE OR immigration) (removed OR deported OR deportation OR repatriated OR removal flight) -is:retweet lang:en

query_lanes.label: Detention and arrests
query_lanes.query: (ICE OR "immigration agents" OR HSI) (arrested OR detained OR custody OR detention) -is:retweet lang:en

query_lanes.label: Raids and operations
query_lanes.query: (ICE OR HSI OR "immigration enforcement") (raid OR raids OR operation OR sweep OR warrant) -is:retweet lang:en

query_lanes.label: Worksite enforcement
query_lanes.query: (ICE OR HSI) (worksite OR workplace OR employer OR factory OR restaurant) (raid OR arrest OR operation OR audit) -is:retweet lang:en

query_lanes.label: Courthouse enforcement
query_lanes.query: (ICE OR "immigration agents") (courthouse OR court OR hearing) (arrest OR detained OR custody) -is:retweet lang:en

query_lanes.label: Schools hospitals community locations
query_lanes.query: (ICE OR "immigration agents") (school OR hospital OR church OR neighborhood OR community) (arrest OR detained OR agents OR enforcement) -is:retweet lang:en

query_lanes.label: Smuggling and trafficking
query_lanes.query: (HSI OR ICE) (human smuggling OR human trafficking OR migrant smuggling) (arrest OR charged OR indicted OR operation) -is:retweet lang:en

query_lanes.label: Fugitives and public safety arrests
query_lanes.query: (ICE OR ERO) (fugitive OR sex offender OR wanted OR public safety) (arrested OR removed OR detained) -is:retweet lang:en

query_lanes.label: Wire services and national desks
query_lanes.query: (ICE OR "immigration enforcement" OR HSI) (arrest OR detained OR raid OR deported OR removal) (Reuters OR AP OR Bloomberg) -is:retweet lang:en

query_lanes.label: National television news
query_lanes.query: (ICE OR "immigration agents") (arrest OR detained OR raid OR operation OR deportation) (CNN OR NBC OR ABC OR CBS OR Fox) -is:retweet lang:en

query_lanes.label: National politics and policy media
query_lanes.query: (ICE OR "immigration enforcement") (arrest OR detention OR deportation OR operation) (Axios OR Politico OR NPR OR PBS) -is:retweet lang:en

query_lanes.label: Local television stations
query_lanes.query: (ICE OR HSI OR "immigration agents") (arrest OR detained OR raid OR operation) ("local news" OR TV OR News) -is:retweet lang:en

query_lanes.label: Local newspapers
query_lanes.query: (ICE OR HSI OR "immigration enforcement") (arrest OR detention OR raid OR deportation) (reported OR newsroom OR newspaper) -is:retweet lang:en

query_lanes.label: Spanish national media
query_lanes.query: (ICE OR inmigración) (arresto OR detenido OR redada OR deportación OR operativo) -is:retweet lang:es

query_lanes.label: Spanish local reports
query_lanes.query: (ICE OR agentes migratorios) (arrestaron OR detuvieron OR redada OR operativo) (ciudad OR condado OR comunidad) -is:retweet lang:es

query_lanes.label: Legal and advocacy organizations
query_lanes.query: (ICE OR "immigration agents") (arrest OR detained OR raid OR sighting) (lawyer OR legal OR rights OR advocacy) -is:retweet lang:en

query_lanes.label: Community field reports
query_lanes.query: (ICE OR "immigration agents") (seen OR spotted OR sighting OR agents OR raid) (today OR tonight OR morning) -is:retweet lang:en
